title: nasturtium thaliana
intro: Nasturtium thaliana, also known as common or Indian cress, is a flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family. It is known for its bright, showy flowers and edible leaves, stems, and flowers. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Nasturtium thaliana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and its leaves and flowers can be added to salads and other dishes for their peppery flavor and nutritional benefits.
